purpose: Promote proof builds into serious operational systems without confusing software platforms, research papers, manuscript systems, source archives, and portfolio pages.

shared_architecture.source_layer: source_workbench assigns source roles, claim ceilings, and close-read tasks
shared_architecture.proof_layer: component_proof_builds assigns artifact, inspection, falsification, and next capture step
shared_architecture.runtime_layer: project-specific app, workstation, corpus service, manuscript system, or packet registry
shared_architecture.test_layer: claim ceiling, source warrant, privacy, state transition, replay, human-AI delta, and workflow dependency tests
shared_architecture.release_layer: public-safe static package under 40 MB plus local full-system builds where appropriate

honest_boundary: This control plane defines the route from proof build to operational build. It does not assert that every project is already a finished software product.
